A BookBank Field Guide

Lua

The small language that scripts everything — and how to embed it inside Elixir & Ash.

In the voice of The Clear Mentor · Lua 5.5

Contents

  1. Why Lua?the extension language
  2. Lua in Ten Minutessyntax you'll actually use
  3. Tablesthe one data structure
  4. Metatables & OOPbehavior on demand
  5. Coroutinescooperative concurrency
  6. Embedding in Elixirthe lua library
  7. Lua & Ashscripting your domain
  8. Interesting Use Caseswhere this shines
  9. Sandboxing in Productionsafety & trade-offs
  10. Cheatsheetthe 30-second reference

Press → to turn the page, ← to go back, ↑ for Contents. Everything here runs offline; code is grounded in the official Lua 5.5 manual, the lua Elixir library, and ash_lua.
